title: bridge-teams: text_body strips only first <at> tag; nested or multiple mentions not handled
description: TeamsActivity::text_body (teams.rs:62-68) strips only a leading <at>...</at> tag. Teams may include multiple @mentions in a message (e.g., '@Bot hello @Alice how are you'), which would produce '<at>Bot</at> hello <at>Alice</at> how are you'. After stripping the leading tag, the nie message contains '<at>Alice</at>' as literal text. This is already partially tracked as nie-f4ce.8 ('bridge-teams @mention stripping incomplete'), but the existing issue may not cover the case where text begins with a stripped tag followed by more tags later in the message. Filing to confirm scope of nie-f4ce.8.
close_reason: Teams text_body now strips all <at>...</at> spans in a loop
